title: coryphantha muehlenpfordtii
intro: Coryphantha muehlenpfordtii, also known as the Muehlenpfordt's pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of cactus that has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions and wounds, likely due to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. Coryphantha muehlenpfordtii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions or decoctions of its stems and flowers.
